title: Cute-Creepy Expressions
bio: Mina Spooksmile is a little expression ghost who practices being spooky without hurting feelings. She feels proud, keeps bat-shaped blush stickers, and giggles when her fangs look polite.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw four small ghost blob heads in a row. Use rounded tops and soft wavy bottoms.
steps.hint: Make each blob the same size so the expression changes are easy to compare.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, give each ghost a different face: shy spooky, fang smile, worried stare, and mischievous grin.
steps.hint: Use eyebrows, eye size, and mouth curve to make each face feel different.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add tiny fangs, cheek stickers, bat sparkles, little sweat drops, and one floating candy crumb.
steps.hint: One creepy detail plus one cute detail makes the balance work.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the ghost shapes, faces, fangs, cheeks, sparkles, sweat drops, and candy crumb.
steps.hint: Keep the fangs small and rounded so the ghosts stay friendly.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the ghosts, cheeks, stickers, sparkles, and crumb. Add soft floating shadows under each ghost.
steps.hint: Use matching shadows under every ghost to tie the expression sheet together.
